creator: wb@yorikke.arb-phys.uni-dortmund.de
text:
Some days ago, I tried to burn a CD-ROM on 3.0 (pre-ELF).
	I lost the CD on a writing error with cdrecord. 
	Cdrecord was usable under 2.2. Cdrecord uses a file
	/dev/scgx, which is symlinked to worm0 or worm0.ctl.
	Neither works anymore. worm0 rejects inquiries such
	as 'next writable track'. Worm0.ctl rejects real
	writing.

Fix: 

A really usable method to access generic SCSI devices
	is needed. Maybe CAM is the solution. But I'm afraid that
	the code seems not be there now.
